sentences.quote: We formalize, in the Lean~4 proof assistant, the structural content of the Hayden--Preskill (2007) information-recovery protocol~\cite{HaydenPreskill2007} on the modular-tensor-category (MTC) horizon-boundary-condition substrate previously developed for black-hole microstate counting in this project.
sentences.quote_normalized: we formalize, in the lean~4 proof assistant, the structural content of the hayden--preskill (2007) information-recovery protocol~ on the modular-tensor-category (mtc) horizon-boundary-condition substrate previously developed for black-hole microstate counting in this project.

sentences.quote: The formalization defines two information-theoretic observables on top of the existing horizon data: a code-distance proxy $\dC := \log\dmax$ identifying the topological-shielding scale of an encoded logical qubit, and a Hayden--Preskill scrambling-time bound $\Tscr := \log\Dsq = \log\sum_a d_a^2$ giving the substrate-only part of $(\beta/2\pi)\,S_{\mathrm{BH}}$ after the area law is pulled out.
sentences.quote_normalized: the formalization defines two information-theoretic observables on top of the existing horizon data: a code-distance proxy $\dc := \log\dmax$ identifying the topological-shielding scale of an encoded logical qubit, and a hayden--preskill scrambling-time bound $\tscr := \log\dsq = \log\sum_a d_a^2$ giving the substrate-only part of $(\beta/2\pi)\,s_{bh}$ after the area law is pulled out.

sentences.quote: The central structural theorem proves that positive code distance is equivalent to non-abelian fusion ($\dmax > 1$) and that admissibility of the substrate forces a positive scrambling-time bound, via the sum-bound $\Dsq \ge \dmax^2$.
sentences.quote_normalized: the central structural theorem proves that positive code distance is equivalent to non-abelian fusion ($\dmax > 1$) and that admissibility of the substrate forces a positive scrambling-time bound, via the sum-bound $\dsq \ge \dmax^2$.

sentences.quote: The Fibonacci substrate is the concrete non-abelian witness ($\dC = \log\varphi \approx 0.481 < \log 2$), and the singleton (vacuum-only) substrate is the falsifier.
sentences.quote_normalized: the fibonacci substrate is the concrete non-abelian witness ($\dc = \log\varphi \approx 0.481 < \log 2$), and the singleton (vacuum-only) substrate is the falsifier.

sentences.quote: Hayden--Preskill recovery at the scrambling-time bound is established universally over encoding choices, by case-splitting on the encoding anyon's quantum dimension.
sentences.quote_normalized: hayden--preskill recovery at the scrambling-time bound is established universally over encoding choices, by case-splitting on the encoding anyon's quantum dimension.

sentences.quote: The module ships ten substantive theorems with zero \texttt{sorry} statements and no new axioms beyond the kernel's three.
sentences.quote_normalized: the module ships ten substantive theorems with zero sorry statements and no new axioms beyond the kernel's three.
sentences.agent_notes: IA recheck: grep '^theorem' QECHolographyBridge.lean = 10; sorry = 0; axiom = 0. All match.

sentences.quote: The full holographic-dictionary side --- AdS/CFT spectrum identification and explicit Yoshida--Kitaev decoder construction~\cite{YoshidaKitaev2017} --- is intentionally deferred.
sentences.quote_normalized: the full holographic-dictionary side --- ads/cft spectrum identification and explicit yoshida--kitaev decoder construction~ --- is intentionally deferred.

sentences.quote: The Hayden--Preskill protocol~\cite{HaydenPreskill2007} establishes that information thrown into an old (more-than-half-evaporated) black hole can be recovered by an observer with access to the early Hawking radiation, on a scrambling timescale $t_{\mathrm{scr}} \simeq (\beta/2\pi)\log S_{\mathrm{BH}}$.
sentences.quote_normalized: the hayden--preskill protocol~ establishes that information thrown into an old (more-than-half-evaporated) black hole can be recovered by an observer with access to the early hawking radiation, on a scrambling timescale $t_{scr} \simeq (\beta/2\pi)\log s_{bh}$.

sentences.quote: This result, together with subsequent work on holographic quantum error correction~\cite{AlmheiriDongHarlow2015,PYHP2015}, established a quantum-information-theoretic interpretation of black-hole horizons that has become foundational to modern approaches to the information puzzle.
sentences.quote_normalized: this result, together with subsequent work on holographic quantum error correction~, established a quantum-information-theoretic interpretation of black-hole horizons that has become foundational to modern approaches to the information puzzle.

sentences.quote: Anyonic substrates --- modular tensor categories arising in fault-tolerant topological quantum computation~\cite{KitaevAnyons2003,NayakAnyons2008} --- provide a natural setting for the bulk side of this story.
sentences.quote_normalized: anyonic substrates --- modular tensor categories arising in fault-tolerant topological quantum computation~ --- provide a natural setting for the bulk side of this story.

sentences.quote: Topological entanglement entropy~\cite{KitaevPreskill2006} identifies the universal sub-leading area-law contribution as $\gamma = \log D$, where $D = \sqrt{\sum_a d_a^2}$ is the total quantum dimension.
sentences.quote_normalized: topological entanglement entropy~ identifies the universal sub-leading area-law contribution as $\gamma = \log d$, where $d = \sqrt{\sum_a d_a^2}$ is the total quantum dimension.

sentences.quote: Recent project work uses the abstract MTC horizon-boundary-condition data --- per-object positive quantum dimensions, an attainable maximum dmax, and the Immirzi tuning parameter --- as the substrate for emergent black-hole microstate counting.
sentences.quote_normalized: recent project work uses the abstract mtc horizon-boundary-condition data --- per-object positive quantum dimensions, an attainable maximum dmax, and the immirzi tuning parameter --- as the substrate for emergent black-hole microstate counting.

sentences.quote: A code-distance proxy $\dC := \log \dmax$ measuring the fusion-channel entropy that shields an encoded logical qubit from boundary errors.
sentences.quote_normalized: a code-distance proxy $\dc := \log \dmax$ measuring the fusion-channel entropy that shields an encoded logical qubit from boundary errors.

sentences.quote: A scrambling-time bound $\Tscr := \log \Dsq$ measuring the substrate-only part of the Hayden--Preskill scrambling time.
sentences.quote_normalized: a scrambling-time bound $\tscr := \log \dsq$ measuring the substrate-only part of the hayden--preskill scrambling time.

sentences.quote: We do not derive the AdS/CFT dictionary or construct explicit decoders; the Yoshida--Kitaev protocol~\cite{YoshidaKitaev2017} remains outside the scope.
sentences.quote_normalized: we do not derive the ads/cft dictionary or construct explicit decoders; the yoshida--kitaev protocol~ remains outside the scope.

sentences.quote: The Hayden--Preskill code on an MTC horizon boundary condition is encoded as structure HPCode { horizon : HorizonMTCBC; encoding_obj : Fin horizon.num_objects } augmenting the substrate with a single encoding anyon.
sentences.quote_normalized: the hayden--preskill code on an mtc horizon boundary condition is encoded as structure hpcode { horizon : horizonmtcbc; encoding_obj : fin horizon.num_objects } augmenting the substrate with a single encoding anyon.

sentences.quote: The MTC categorical data ($S$, $T$ modular matrices; $F$, $R$ braided data) is not required at this abstract level; concrete witnesses live in the Fibonacci instance \texttt{fibonacciHorizonBC} (used for the witness theorems below) and the singleton instance \texttt{trivialAbelianHorizonBC} (used for the falsifier).
sentences.quote_normalized: the mtc categorical data ($s$, $t$ modular matrices; $f$, $r$ braided data) is not required at this abstract level; concrete witnesses live in the fibonacci instance fibonaccihorizonbc (used for the witness theorems below) and the singleton instance trivialabelianhorizonbc (used for the falsifier).
sentences.agent_notes: fibonacciHorizonBC defined in BHEntropyMicroscopic, imported into QECHolographyBridge. trivialAbelianHorizonBC in QECHolographyBridge.

sentences.quote: The minimal substantive content needed to upgrade $0 < \Dsq$ to $1 \le \Dsq$ ships as the lemma \texttt{one\_le\_globalDimSq}: the unit object's contribution $d_{\mathrm{unit}}^2 = 1$ to the sum gives the lower bound.
sentences.quote_normalized: the minimal substantive content needed to upgrade $0 < \dsq$ to $1 \le \dsq$ ships as the lemma one\_le\_globaldimsq: the unit object's contribution $d_{unit}^2 = 1$ to the sum gives the lower bound.

sentences.quote: The wave's named structural anchor is theorem code_distance_scaling_matches_anyonic_fusion_iff_fusion_in_admissible_class : (0 < H.codeDistance <-> 1 < H.horizon.d_max) AND (0 < H.codeDistance -> 0 < H.scramblingTimeBound).
sentences.quote_normalized: the wave's named structural anchor is theorem code_distance_scaling_matches_anyonic_fusion_iff_fusion_in_admissible_class : (0 < h.codedistance <-> 1 < h.horizon.d_max) and (0 < h.codedistance -> 0 < h.scramblingtimebound).

sentences.quote: Both halves are load-bearing. The biconditional connects the information-theoretic observable $\dC > 0$ to the structural fusion-class condition $\dmax > 1$ via $\log_{>0}$ monotonicity. The forward implication shows that admissible substrates force a positive scrambling-time bound, via $\Dsq \ge \dmax^2$.
sentences.quote_normalized: both halves are load-bearing. the biconditional connects the information-theoretic observable $\dc > 0$ to the structural fusion-class condition $\dmax > 1$ via $\log_{>0}$ monotonicity. the forward implication shows that admissible substrates force a positive scrambling-time bound, via $\dsq \ge \dmax^2$.

sentences.quote: Theorem (\texttt{recovery\_at\_scrambling\_bound}). For every \texttt{HPCode}, recovery is information-theoretically possible when boundary entropy reaches the substrate scrambling-time bound: $\log d_{\mathrm{encode}} \le \log \Dsq$.
sentences.quote_normalized: theorem (recovery\_at\_scrambling\_bound). for every hpcode, recovery is information-theoretically possible when boundary entropy reaches the substrate scrambling-time bound: $\log d_{encode} \le \log \dsq$.

sentences.quote: The proof case-splits on $d_{\mathrm{encode}} \ge 1$ versus $d_{\mathrm{encode}} < 1$.
sentences.quote_normalized: the proof case-splits on $d_{encode} \ge 1$ versus $d_{encode} < 1$.

sentences.quote: Figure caption: Hayden-Preskill QEC observables across MTC substrates. Left: code-distance proxy log d_max for Fibonacci (d_τ=φ≈1.618, dC≈0.481), Ising (d_σ=√2, dC≈0.347), Fibonacci sub-sector of SU(3)_{k=2}, and singleton (d_max=1, dC=0). Reference line at log 2 ≈ 0.693. Right: scrambling-time bound log D^2.
sentences.quote_normalized: figure caption: hayden-preskill qec observables across mtc substrates. left: code-distance proxy log d_max for fibonacci (d_τ=φ≈1.618, dc≈0.481), ising (d_σ=√2, dc≈0.347), fibonacci sub-sector of su(3)_{k=2}, and singleton (d_max=1, dc=0). reference line at log 2 ≈ 0.693. right: scrambling-time bound log d^2.
sentences.agent_notes: Recompute: log(1.618)=0.481, log(sqrt(2))=0.347, log(2)=0.693. All match. Figure file fig_code_distance_vs_fusion_spectrum.png exists.

sentences.quote: The Fibonacci substrate is the concrete non-abelian witness ($d_\tau = \varphi$, $\dC = \log\varphi \approx 0.481 < \log 2$). The quantitative bound \texttt{fibonacci\_HPCode\_codeDistance\_lt\_log\_two} proves $\dC < \log 2$ via $\varphi < 2 \Leftrightarrow \sqrt{5} < 3 \Leftrightarrow 5 < 9$.
sentences.quote_normalized: the fibonacci substrate is the concrete non-abelian witness ($d_\tau = \varphi$, $\dc = \log\varphi \approx 0.481 < \log 2$). the quantitative bound fibonacci\_hpcode\_codedistance\_lt\_log\_two proves $\dc < \log 2$ via $\varphi < 2 \leftrightarrow \sqrt{5} < 3 \leftrightarrow 5 < 9$.

sentences.quote: The scrambling-time witness \texttt{fibonacci\_HPCode\_scramblingTimeBound\_pos} forwards the substrate's positive code distance through the admissibility theorem to obtain $\Tscr > 0$, making the admissibility theorem load-bearing.
sentences.quote_normalized: the scrambling-time witness fibonacci\_hpcode\_scramblingtimebound\_pos forwards the substrate's positive code distance through the admissibility theorem to obtain $\tscr > 0$, making the admissibility theorem load-bearing.

sentences.quote: The singleton-substrate falsifier \texttt{trivialAbelian\_violates\_admissibility} disposes of the $\dmax = 1$ MTC: the proof invokes the admissibility biconditional to extract $1 < 1$, contradicting irreflexivity.
sentences.quote_normalized: the singleton-substrate falsifier trivialabelian\_violates\_admissibility disposes of the $\dmax = 1$ mtc: the proof invokes the admissibility biconditional to extract $1 < 1$, contradicting irreflexivity.

sentences.quote: The substantive cross-bridge \texttt{horizon\_BC\_implies\_HP\_admissible} takes a hypothesis instance of the project's \texttt{H\_HorizonBoundaryCondition} structural assumption and returns $1 < \dmax$. The proof body invokes the structural assumption's area-law field ($0 < \log\dmax$).

sentences.quote: The Python mirror in \texttt{src/qec\_holography/} provides numerical evaluation across four concrete MTC substrates (Fibonacci, Ising, $SU(3)_{k=2}$ sub-sector, singleton) and a 30-case \texttt{pytest} suite pinning the Lean theorems to numerical agreement.

sentences.quote: Identify which conformal field theory on the boundary corresponds to a given MTC; the AdS/CFT spectrum dictionary is not constructed.
sentences.quote_normalized: identify which conformal field theory on the boundary corresponds to a given mtc; the ads/cft spectrum dictionary is not constructed.

sentences.quote: Construct an explicit decoder for the Hayden--Preskill recovery in the sense of Yoshida--Kitaev~\cite{YoshidaKitaev2017}; the existence of recovery at the scrambling-time threshold is the information-theoretic statement we prove, not the algorithm that realizes it.
sentences.quote_normalized: construct an explicit decoder for the hayden--preskill recovery in the sense of yoshida--kitaev~; the existence of recovery at the scrambling-time threshold is the information-theoretic statement we prove, not the algorithm that realizes it.

sentences.quote: Reproduce the Page curve quantitatively; the formalization records the threshold but not the dynamics.
